response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine staff-level credentials, but he falls well short of the core GenAI requirements. His AI exposure is limited to a single line in his current role (started April 2025), with no demonstrated depth in LLMs, RAG pipelines, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks. Python — a primary language for this role — is entirely absent from his skill set. His MCP work and agentic workflow contributions are promising signals but are too nascent and undescribed to offset the missing qualifications.
strengths: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server development and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq directly matches a key technology listed in the JD
Staff-level individual contributor track record with mentoring, workshops, and cross-functional technical leadership across multiple organisations
High-throughput data pipeline and microservices experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second) demonstrates production-grade systems thinking
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skill set and resume — it is one of two primary languages explicitly required for the role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability tooling anywhere in the resume
GenAI experience is limited to a single vague bullet in a role that began April 2025, with no quantified outcomes, model names, or framework depth provided

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG and vector DB experience
MCP server and agentic workflow contribution
